disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: CDC tightens home monitoring guidance for high-risk hantavirus contacts - The Washington Post
updates.body_en: CDC tightens home monitoring guidance for high-risk hantavirus contacts The Washington Post
updates.summary_zh: CDC 收紧高风险汉坦病毒接触者居家监测指南。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak in Wales: Welsh residents under watch after MV Hondius exposure links; signs to watch - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak in Wales: Welsh residents under watch after MV Hondius exposure links; signs to watch The Times of India
updates.summary_zh: 威尔士汉坦病毒爆发，居民因与MV Hondius关联受监测。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus monitoring ends in Atlanta as Emory University Hospital releases patients - FOX 5 Atlanta
updates.body_en: Hantavirus monitoring ends in Atlanta as Emory University Hospital releases patients FOX 5 Atlanta
updates.summary_zh: 亚特兰大汉坦病毒监测结束，埃默里大学医院患者出院。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus has not mutated to be more transmissible: WHO - The Hill
updates.body_en: Hantavirus has not mutated to be more transmissible: WHO The Hill
updates.summary_zh: WHO 表示汉坦病毒未发生变异以增强传播性。

updates.title_en: Colorado health officials confirm deadly hantavirus case - KUSA.com
updates.body_en: Colorado health officials confirm deadly hantavirus case KUSA.com
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州卫生官员确认一例致命汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Fourth King County resident linked to cruise ship hantavirus outbreak - The Seattle Times
updates.body_en: Fourth King County resident linked to cruise ship hantavirus outbreak The Seattle Times
updates.summary_zh: 金县第四名居民与邮轮汉坦病毒暴发有关。

updates.title_en: WHO providing update on hantavirus outbreak - CTV News
updates.body_en: WHO providing update on hantavirus outbreak CTV News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 就汉坦病毒暴发提供最新情况。

updates.body_en: Sin Nombre hantavirus case tied to home mouse exposure in Chelan County KOMO
updates.summary_zh: 谢兰县一例辛诺柏汉坦病毒病例与家中老鼠接触有关。

updates.body_en: Ontario now testing asymptomatic people for hantavirus; low-risk cases to stop isolating if negative NanaimoNewsNOW
updates.summary_zh: 安大略省开始对无症状者进行汉坦病毒检测，低风险者阴性可解除隔离。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus Updates County of San Luis Obispo (.gov)

updates.body_en: Hantavirus reported in Chelan County, WA, unrelated to cruise ship outbreak FOX 13 Seattle
updates.summary_zh: 华盛顿州谢兰县报告汉坦病毒病例，与邮轮暴发无关。

updates.body_en: No known cases of hantavirus in U.S. as officials monitor 41 with possible exposure NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 美国无确诊病例，监测41名可能接触者。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus live updates: WHO hunts for source of virus ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
